content: RUMOR ALERT! I heard from a reliable source that the infamous Tamsin Thickey will be appearing in #TheHunt this year!
So excited for the new season of #TheHunt
AND WE'RE OFF! Got all my girlies over for the day 1 watch party! @LeaLea @HeartLes @RoraBorealis #TheHunt
FIRST KILL! Dumbass orc didn't stand a chance lmao #TheHunt
Tamsin can get it man i dont care how many people shes killed she can kill me if she wants #TheHunt
uh oh that's a lot of dogs╭(* _ *)╮this guy means business #TheHunt
THEY CONVINCED HIM TO LEAVE? HOW? This is fucking scripted it's so obvious #TheHunt
Is that a bag of holding? Hells yeah these guys are gonna win if they know the astral plane trick lol. Would the producers allow it though? #TheHunt
Did something happen to the broadcast? #TheHunt
Oh the broadcast is back, who the hell is this guy? Seems like a sick cunt haha #TheHunt
HFS I LOOKED IT UP AND THATS A CRIME BOSS! HIS MAFIA RUNS THE WHOLE MARKET DRISTRICT AND THE ENTIRE FISHING INDUSTRY ON THE COAST! WHAT IS HE DOING HERE?? IS HE A HUNTER OR A PRISONER?????? #TheHunt
BREAKING NEWS! Don Flipcup, feared leader of the Flipcup Family is apparently present this year! It's unknown if he's a prisoner or a hunter though! I'll post more as we learn more! #TheHunt
Is it snowing?? That's crazy! The weather effects are so realistic this year! #TheHunt
Oh shit these chicks are hot #TheHunt
I wish Tamsin would whisper in my ear like that broooo im down colossal lmao #TheHunt
These guys in the town don't stand a chance, Tamsin and Ares are gonna whack em #TheHunt
Told ya #TheHunt
How did they not see that mimic? Ametur hour lol #TheHunt
Say, who's that handsome red guy?（￢з￢）#TheHunt
Good thing the cameras have darkvision lol #TheHunt
His name is Sparkle stooooopppp omg im crying #TheHunt
AAAAA THAT DRAGON IS SO CUTE OMG #TheHunt
Did anyone see them take the poisoned ale just now? It cut away just as they were doing it Σ(-᷅_-᷄ ๑) #TheHunt
Gwendolyn the infamous culprit of the ale district murders makes a brief appearance before meeting her untimely end at the hands of Tamsin and Ares! #TheHunt
Invisibility cloak acquired! These guys are really lucky! #TheHunt
Hope they die in the rapids #TheHunt
The glowing mushrooms are sooo pretty, I wonder if they're real #TheHunt
Just got in trouble from posting from the work account oops lol #TheHunt
Aw they helped that spider! I suppose that's the least they could do after Tamsin burned their house (¬､¬) spiders are people too! #TheHunt
I'm so fucking scared of spiders #TheHunt
Like actually though would it have killed them to put a little "arachnophobia warning" banner at the bottom of the screen or something? #TheHunt
So fucking glad that part is over #TheHunt
Watchin #TheHunt from the waffle house rn lol
WHAT HAPPENED WHEN DID TAMSINS CLOTHES GET WET WHY DIDNT ANYONE TELL ME #TheHunt
Got a brother bricked up in da waffle house nooooo lmfao #TheHunt
Is this some kind of maze? I have no idea what's going on. What is that music that's playing? #TheHunt
Why are they yelling down the tunnels? What do they know that we don't (☉_ ☉) #TheHunt
OMG they figured it out already? How??? #TheHunt
Why does it keep showing these losers? Surely there are other prisoners doing more interesting things, right? #TheHunt
A mirror maze! This is confusing to watch haha theres just reflections everywhere. #TheHunt
I think that guy was another Flipcup dude? #TheHunt
OMG They tricked that guy into drinking the poisoned ale?? I knew they were going to use it for something crazy! These guys are so much fun to watch. #TheHunt
They're still underground? Snore #TheHunt
Are they gonna go down there? It sounds so scary!! #TheHunt
Slip and fall #TheHunt
MORE BUGS ARE YOU KIDDING ME? I can't watch anymore #TheHunt
The secret to opening the tomb was a knock knock joke? That's so fucking funny lmao #TheHunt
THAT'S A DEMILICH! These guys are toast lmao they had a good run #TheHunt
BRO NO WAY THEY JUST PUSHED THEIR TEAMMATES INTO THE BAG WITH THE DEMILICH HAHA YOOOOOO #TheHunt
I take back everything I said, Tamsin and Ares fuck super hard, I'm so in. #TheHunt #TamsinsTeam
I can't believe they did that! My heart is broken ;_; #TheHunt
I'm crying, I can't believe my beautiful Ares would kill their friends like that #TheHunt
NOOO! What?? Why did they do that?? I don't understand! #TheHunt
I thought these guys were going to win but now I don't want them to. I feel sick. #TheHunt
OMG that was out of nowhere haha #TheHunt
Honestly the biggest bummer is that they lost their bag of holding lmao #TheHunt
They're STILL underground? Come on man every time I tune in nothing is happening #TheHunt
Ok apparently something crazy just happened and I just keep tuning in at bad parts lol my bad yall #TheHunt
A dungeon at the bottom of a dungeon? How big is this place?? This is crazy! #TheHunt
Watching them kill monsters should be exciting but I don't feel anything right now. I just want it to show what other prisoners are up to. #TheHunt
Why are they being so sus about this little girl? She's been here since the beginning, that's too long for an illusion spell to last. #TheHunt
They're leaving without helping that little girl? Tamsin and Ares are monsters. I hope they lose. #TheHunt
Why are they just leaving her??? She's cold and scared!! ;_; #TheHunt
#TheHunt sucks this year, everyone is being mean and crazy. I just want it to be over.

Seeing a lot of bitching and moaning about the little girl. Did nobody think to ask why a little girl is in a death game in the first place? No, just taking shit at face value, fucking dumbasses. It's obviously not really a little girl, it's some kind of creature. Ares already figured it out. #TheHunt
Wtf, is the rain going upward? How are they doing that? This show is awesome man #TheHunt
Oh shit, the new outfits are dope #TheHunt
TAMSIN MY LOVE YOU LOOK SO SEXY IN YOUR PINK ROBE AHHH #TheHunt
Yeah it was smart to shoo that guy away honestly he looked sketch lol #TheHunt

BREAKING NEWS! Since the strange turn of events yesterday when Tamsin and Ares killed their teammates, I've received many DMs regarding allegations toward their former companions. It seems Tamsin and Ares knew something we didn't, and perhaps did the right thing. #TheHunt
Did anyone see the post from @FaeNews this morning? I feel bad for reacting the way I did without knowing the full story. #TheHunt
I'm still upset about leaving the little girl behind but I'll forgive what happened with the demilich. They're on thin ice though. #TheHunt
I knew Ares wouldn't do something that horrible without a good reason! I love you Ares! I'm sorry for doubting you! #TheHunt
BIG MOOSE! #TheHunt
Yo they're about to walk into that trap that that weird guy set up on like the second day lol has he been waiting here the whole time? #TheHunt
Are those real zombies?! #TheHunt
Knew those zombies didn't stand a chance, but I wonder if they'll find the lady hiding upstairs? #TheHunt
Isn't this the lady that got separated from the little girl like 2 days ago? #TheHunt
Anyone else think corella is relly pretty? in like a id love to watch her raise our beautiful children together kinda way ya know #TheHunt
No way they're going underground again fuck me #TheHunt
Come on down to Bob's Crab Shack at Midway Marketplace for 50% bushels until we run out #TheHunt
These fog maze puzzles are so confusing, I feel so stupid watching them :o #TheHunt
Hey, there he is again! What's cookin' good lookin'? #TheHunt
Yay they're going back for the girl!! I hope everything works out! #TheHunt
Nooo Tamsin! I know you're mad about her tricking Corella but don't hurt her! #TheHunt
Damn that bitch got an arm on her #TheHunt
Broooo what i would give to get choked by Tamsin like that ong hahahaha #TheHunt
Oh word? The changeling is really cute? #TheHunt
Wait, Artemis and Ares know each other?? #TheHunt
I'm not crying you're crying (;﹏;) I soooo wish I could see the memory they shared #TheHunt
They're siblings????? AAAAAAAA I'M SO HAPPY #TheHunt
I would die for Ares <3 #TheHunt
Is anyone going to mention that it seems weird that Artemis is supposedly 35 but looks 18? Is she still hiding her appearance? I don't trust her. #TheHunt
What's up with the rainbow lightning? It looks pretty #TheHunt
@Ominis @SlytherinSebastian TURN ON THE TV! TAMSIN IS IN THE HUNT THIS YEAR! HOW DID WE NOT HEAR ABOUT THIS! #TheHunt
@AnnWithAPlan Honestly forgot I have an account on here. Didn't know Tamsin had turned to a life of crime after school, but I'll support her no matter what for what she did for us. #TheHunt
@Ominis Come over to my place, I just thought of a great idea. #TheHunt
Tamsin is such a good dancer omg #TheHunt
If they have one more fucking musical number I'm gonna kill myself #TheHunt
How can they expect to reach the tower if they're not going to use the boat? #TheHunt
THEY'RE WALKING ON WATER AAAA SO COOL #TheHunt
If Artemis is a changeling why doesn't she make her tits bigger #TheHunt
They dont stand a chance against that giant haha #TheHunt
(,,•o•,,) woah it's so foggy! #TheHunt
Alright maybe now they stand a chance against that giant haha #TheHunt
They convinced it to leave? Again? Booooo #TheHunt
Oh shit he blasted the fuck out of that ship haha at least someone got killed *snore* #TheHunt
Awww Ares and Corella are so cute together <3 #TheHunt
I'm so glad they didn't fight the giant, he didn't seem like a bad guy! #TheHunt
I hope they kiss hehe #TheHunt
BREAKING NEWS! Ares and Corella's heart-to-heart is interrupted by an ambush! Ares is on the brink of death! Tune in right now, don't miss it! #TheHunt
ARES NOOOO!! FIGHT FIGHT WIN!!! #TheHunt
The halfelf is about to bite it haha #TheHunt
Damn Tamsin killed them in her sleep haha, Ares is literally useless. #TheHunt
Tamsin is so fucking hot brooooo she killed those guys without even waking up #TheHunt
Tamsin saved Ares!!! I'm so happy!!!!! #TheHunt
Omg I think Artemis has a flipcup mafia tattoo on her back. Did anyone else see that?? I feel like this is gonna be a problem lol #TheHunt
Just when I thought Tamsin couldnt get any hotter she picks up a golden trident lookin like a goddess my love #TheHunt
Oh shit I know that growl from my marine biology class, there's a giant eel in this room with them lol they're dead #TheHunt
DID ARTEMIS JUST DIE??? #TheHunt
ARTEMIS NOOOO!!! #TheHunt
I literally just said they shouldn't have brought Artemis haha damn #TheHunt
Thank gods they killed that thing but is Artemis going to be ok?? #TheHunt
Aw man they revived Artemis. All she fucking does is whine lol I was hoping that was the end of her. #TheHunt
This treasure room is so pretty omg #TheHunt
THIS JUST IN! Artemis is from a rival gang?? What will Tamsin and Ares make of this revelation? Tune in now! #TheHunt
Artemis is right, why does it matter if they were in gangs before? If they win they'll be rich and famous, their old lives don't matter anymore. #TheHunt
Artemis said the pong family's boss hasn't done anything to help Ares and Tamsin but he literally sent that guy Sneaky Jimmy in to give them advice. I still don't trust this bitch. #TheHunt
I feel so bad for Artemis. She didn't ask for any of this. #TheHunt
More crocodile tears from Artemis, what else is new lmao #TheHunt
I love that it keeps cutting to Corella just sitting on the surface of the sea and waiting lmao the editors have a good sense of humor #TheHunt
Omg just when I was wondering what this kobold and tabaxi are arguing about the tabaxi blows the kobolds head off #TheHunt
Don Flipcup makes another appearance to taunt Tamsin during her night shift! #TheHunt
Oh fuck she put the personality top hat on his head haha #TheHunt
Of all the people the hat could have made the don think he was, it picked Ranrok? That's insane. #TheHunt
BREAKING NEWS! Ranrok, the infamous goblin warlord famously slain by Tamsin Thickey years ago has evidently escaped from his prison in The Nine Hells! #TheHunt
AAAA HE HAS THE HEAD OF THE HUNTER THAT HAD ALL THW WOLVES! THIS IS SO SCARY!! #TheHunt
Oh fuck corella is so big got me feelin some kinda way #TheHunt
AWWW SMOL ARES! I LOVE THEM SO MUCH! #TheHunt
I keep seeing customers at work doing the mage hand dance that Tamsin does lol #TheHunt

Glad it's finally showing waht some other people are doing, not that I don't like the Tamsin & Friends show they're definitely the most interesting, but I want to know what this weird guy in the mountains is up to #TheHunt
Haha #TheHunt
@LeaLea it's over #TheHunt
@DreadLordMike FUCK YOU #TheHunt
BIG OOF #TheHunt

I'm done for the day, my heart can't take any more #TheHunt

Omg that's the guy that Corella and Artemis were running from when they got separated, but he's so tiny! LOL #TheHunt
Phew back to Corella and Tamsin and their little pocket pals lol #TheHunt
HAHA WHACKED! Finally crocodile tears is gone, good riddance #TheHunt
I was hoping they would have run into this guy when he was full size but at least he got one of em. Hoping Corella eats dirt next, she sucks. #TheHunt
It's honestly really impressive that Corella was able to get that aligator to leave when she's 20ft tall. Actually maybe that's exactly why it didn't try to fight her lol #TheHunt

Wow ok they really are about to lose Artemis and Corella in the same day lol damn #TheHunt
